raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz atwedde tee tohſ
ſchus var Grehku-Uppuri
eekich ta Kehnixa un wiﬀas
randſibas/un likke fauwas Roh-
s us teem/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Preesteri nokatwe
hs/ un ſchihſtija ar winnu
ſintm us to Altari/ un falih-
naja wiſſin Israëlu / jo tas
hninſch bij to Dedsamo-Up-
ri un Grehku-Uppuri patweh-
s preeſch wiſſu Israëlu dar-
t.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſch eezechle Lewitus
tazzija: Nu eſtat juhs fauas
KUNGA Namnā/ ar Puſk-
nifcheem/ Sohma-Stabulehm
Rohklehm pehz tahs Paweh-
hanas Dahwida / un Gada
Kehnixa Redſetaja/ un ta
aweeta Nahtana/ jo ſchi Pa-
hleſchana bija no ta KiNga
hkas zaur fauweem Prawee-
em.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nu ſtabweja tee Le-
i ar Dahwida Spehlehm/ un
Preesteri ar Trummnetehm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Iſſijus pawehleja ta
to Dedsamo-Uppuri us to
ari uppureht / un tai Laikā/
tas Dedsamo-Uppurs fab-
fahze arridſan ta KUNGA
esmas ar Trummnetehm/ un
Dahwida ta Israëta Kehnixa
ehlehm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſa Draudsiba pa-
nijahs/ kamehr tahs Dſeef-
s dſeedatas/ un ar Trumme-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad nu tas Uppurs bija
pabeigts/ tad noteerzehs tas Keh-
ninſch/ un wiſſi/ kas pee winna
atrasti tappe/ un peeluhdſe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz pawehleja tas Keh-
ninſch Iſſijus / un tee Leelee-
Rungi teem Lewiteem / ka teem
btj to KUNGU flaweht ar Dah-
wida/ un ta Redſetaja Affawa
Wahrdeem / un tee teize preeza-
damees/ un paklantijahs / un
peeluhdſe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Iſſijus atbildeja/ un
tazzija: Nu eſtat juhs fauas
Rohkas tam KUNGAM pildij-
ſchi/ eita klaht/ un atneſtet tohſ
zittus Uppurus un Teikſchanas-
Uppurus ta KUNGA Namnā.
Un ta Draudsiba atwedde Up-
purus un Teikſchanas-Uppurus/
un wiſſi/kam labprahtiga Sirde
bija Dedsamo-Uppurus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un to Dedsamo-Uppuru
Puſks/ fo ta Draudsiba atneſſe/
bija ſeptindeſinitſ Wehrſchn/
ſints Aunu/ diwiſints Jehru /
tee bija wiſſi tam KUNGAM
par Dedsamo-Uppuri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wehl fivehtija tee ſesch-
ſints Wehrſchns/ un trihſ tuhſ-
ſtochas Awis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet to Preesteru bija
mas/ un tee ne warreja wiſſus
Dedsamo-Uppurus nodthraht/
tapehz palihdſeja teem winnu
Brahti tee Lewiti/ teekams tas
Darbs pabeigts tappe / un tee-
kams
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
